tasks.label: Capture Flutter Run Output
args: Set-Location 'c:\flutter\flutter_agrolync_pro'; flutter devices | Out-File -FilePath .\flutter_devices.txt -Encoding utf8; flutter run --verbose | Out-File -FilePath .\flutter_run_verbose.txt -Encoding utf8

tasks.label: Extract Flutter Log Errors
args: Get-Content flutter_run_verbose.txt | Select-String -Pattern 'FAILURE|BUILD FAILED|Exception|Error|caused by' -CaseSensitive:$false | Select-Object -Unique | Set-Content error_lines.txt -Encoding utf8

tasks.label: Extract Flutter Log Errors
args: Get-Content flutter_run_verbose.txt | Select-String -Pattern "FAILURE|BUILD FAILED|Exception|Error|caused by" -CaseSensitive:$false | Select-Object -Unique | Set-Content error_lines.txt -Encoding utf8
